meaning: n.煤尘,污迹,(农作物患的)黑穗病vt.弄脏vi.患黑穗病
examples: Social conservatives disapprove of his tabloid smut.
I don't think a comedy has to have so much smut to be funny.
Restoring it would require a visit to the police and a written pledge not to text smut again.
Rupert dished up to his readership gossip and smut, plus baseball, football and soccer events.
But Jillette the magician dismissed the idea that computers permit anonymity which encourages harmful smut.
